Package org.rodinp.keyboard.core.tests

Interface IKeyboardTranslationTester

All Known Implementing Classes:
Text2MathTranslationTester, Text2MathUITranslationTester
public interface IKeyboardTranslationTester
Interface for translation testers.

A translation tester is a class which evaluates the translation of given strings and compares it with other given expected strings.

This interface is created to be able to run the same tests for graphical and non-graphical translators.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    doTest(String... strings)
    Translates and compares the given strings pairwise.
    default void
    doTest(String expectedOutput, String input)
    Translates the given input string and compares the result with expected output.

    Translates the given input string and compares the result with expected output.

    Translates the given input string and compares the result with expected output.

    Translates the given input string and compares the result with expected output.

  • Method Details

    • doTest

      void doTest(String testName, String expectedOutput, String input, int caretOffset)
      Translates the given input string and compares the result with expected output.
      Parameters:
      testName - the name of the test
      expectedOutput - the expected string that should match the translated input
      input - the input string to be translated
      caretOffset - the position of the caret in the input (or a negative number if unavailable)

    • doTest

      default void doTest(String testName, String expectedOutput, String input)
      Translates the given input string and compares the result with expected output.
      Parameters:
      testName - the name of the test
      expectedOutput - the expected string that should match the translated input
      input - the input string to be translated

    • doTest

      void doTest(String expectedOutput, String input, int caretOffset)
      Translates the given input string and compares the result with expected output.
      Parameters:
      expectedOutput - the expected string that should match the translated input
      input - the input string to be translated
      caretOffset - the position of the caret in the input (or a negative number if unavailable)

    • doTest

      default void doTest(String expectedOutput, String input)
      Translates the given input string and compares the result with expected output.
      Parameters:
      expectedOutput - the expected string that should match the translated input
      input - the input string to be translated

    • doTest

      void doTest(String... strings)
      Translates and compares the given strings pairwise.

      The first string of each pair is the expected translation, and the second string is the string to be translated.

      Parameters:
      strings - pairs of expected string and string to be translated to be compared
